title: HP India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: HP India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? HP India Advisory Limited in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About HP India Advisory Limited:
HP India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India Advisory Limited!
